encrypted.title: Encrypted in transit
encrypted.desc: All transfers travel over HTTPS with TLS 1.3. Your files are never read.

expiry.title: Automatic expiry
expiry.desc: Choose 24 hours, 7 or 30 days. At expiry, files are permanently deleted.

password.title: Password protection
password.desc: Add a password: the hash is stored with bcrypt. The password is never saved in plain text.

downloadLimit.title: Download limit
downloadLimit.desc: Set the maximum number of downloads. Once the limit is reached, the link is automatically deactivated.

noAccount.title: Zero accounts
noAccount.desc: No registration. No required email. Anonymous and instant upload.

gdpr.title: GDPR Compliant
gdpr.desc: No tracking. No profiling. Data stays in Europe.

report.notice: Reports are reviewed within 72 hours. For emergencies write to

features.upload2gb: Upload up to 2 GB per file
features.upload50gb: Upload up to 50 GB per file
features.upload200gb: Upload up to 200 GB per file

whatIs.a: VaultTransfer is a secure file transfer service. You can send large files to anyone via a protected link, without the recipient needing an account.

register.q: Do I need to sign up to use it?
register.a: No. You can send files for free without registration. Creating an account gives you access to advanced features like uploads up to 50 GB, custom links and download statistics.

expiry.q: How long are my files available?
expiry.a: With the Free plan, links expire after 7 days. With Pro after 30 days. With Business you can set custom expiry dates or keep files indefinitely.

safe.a: Yes. All transfers travel over HTTPS with TLS 1.3. Files are automatically deleted when the link expires. Servers are in Europe and we are fully GDPR compliant.

whoCanSee.a: Only those who have the link can access the files. You can add a password for extra protection (available with paid plans). Our staff never accesses the contents.

scanned.a: We perform automatic antivirus scanning to protect recipients, but we do not analyze file contents for commercial or advertising purposes.

payment.q: What payment methods do you accept?
payment.a: We accept all major credit and debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express) via Stripe. Payments are secure and we do not store card data.

changePlan.q: Can I change plan at any time?
changePlan.a: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade at any time. For upgrades, the price difference is calculated proportionally for the remaining period. For downgrades, the current plan remains active until the end of the paid period.

annualDiscount.q: How does the annual discount work?
annualDiscount.a: By choosing annual billing you get a fixed price of €45/year for the Pro plan and €120/year for the Business plan, with significant savings compared to monthly. Payment is made in a single upfront payment and the plan is active for 12 months.

refund.a: We offer a full refund within 14 days of purchase if you are not satisfied. After 14 days partial refunds are not possible.

maxSize.q: What is the maximum file size?
maxSize.a: Free plan: 2 GB per file. Pro plan: 50 GB per file. Business plan: 200 GB per file. There are no limits on the number of files you can send.

formats.a: We support most formats: documents, images, videos, ZIP archives, project files, etc. For security reasons, executable files (.exe, .msi, .bat, .sh), scripts (.ps1, .vbs, .js), Office macros (.docm, .xlsm, .pptm), app packages (.apk, .ipa, .deb) and other potentially harmful formats are blocked.

devices.q: Does the service work on all devices?
devices.a: Yes. VaultTransfer works on any device with a modern browser: PC, Mac, Android and iOS smartphones, tablets. No app required.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved. Maybe you are looking for an expired download link?

cookie.message: We use cookies to improve your experience and show relevant ads. Do you accept?
